location: Tân Thuan Đông, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
job_description:
Job Description
Provide troubleshooting and technical support for end-user devices and related hardware.
Administer and maintain the company’s Mail Server, Windows Server, and File Server systems.
Support the configuration, operation, and maintenance of the Domain Controller.
Diagnose and resolve issues related to Microsoft Office 365 applications.
Participate in on-site support and training sessions at client locations when required.
Location: Cu Chi, HCMC
Job Requirements
College or Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology or a related field.
Minimum 1 years of experience in a similar position.
Hands-on experience with Active Directory, Office 365, and ticketing systems.
CCNA, MCSA, or equivalent certifications are an advantage.
Solid foundation and working experience in IT Systems.
Good communication skills in English.
Compensation & Benefits
Competitive salary package with IT allowance.
Annual cash benefit package of VND 9,000,000 for holidays and special occasions.
12 days of annual leave plus 1 additional paid leave day for your birthday.
Full statutory insurance coverage in accordance with Vietnamese labor law.
Premium healthcare insurance package (CMC Care).
Opportunities to join company clubs and various employee engagement programs.
Laptop and necessary technical equipment provided.
Young, dynamic, and professional working environment.

location: Xã Các Sơn, Thanh Hoa, Vietnam
job_description:
[HCM] IT HELPDESK (Long An)
MÔ TẢ CÔNG VIỆC
Theo dõi và xử lý các ticket IT cũng như yêu cầu hỗ trợ kỹ thuật hằng ngày.
Hỗ trợ kỹ thuật cho người dùng cuối thông qua Microsoft Teams, Zalo, Email hoặc hỗ trợ trực tiếp tại chỗ.
Cập nhật và ghi nhận đầy đủ thông tin ticket sau khi hoàn tất xử lý.
Cài đặt, hỗ trợ và xử lý sự cố cho các ứng dụng nội bộ, Microsoft Office và các phần mềm liên quan.
Kiểm tra, chẩn đoán và khắc phục sự cố phần cứng/phần mềm đối với laptop, desktop, máy in, hệ thống WiFi và các thiết bị CNTT khác.
Kiểm tra và hỗ trợ thiết bị phòng họp khi phát sinh sự cố.
Hỗ trợ thiết lập và đảm bảo kết nối cho các cuộc họp nội bộ, họp toàn quốc và họp tại nhà máy.
Quản lý và hỗ trợ các thiết bị CNTT tại các văn phòng được phân công.
Phối hợp với các bộ phận liên quan nhằm đảm bảo hệ thống CNTT vận hành ổn định.
Hỗ trợ giao tiếp tiếng Anh cơ bản với người dùng nước ngoài khi cần thiết.
YÊU CẦU CÔNG VIỆC
Ưu tiên ứng viên có kinh nghiệm ở vị trí IT Helpdesk / IT Support.
Có kiến thức cơ bản về Windows OS, Microsoft 365, Networking, WiFi và máy in.
Có khả năng xử lý và khắc phục sự cố phần cứng, phần mềm máy tính.
Kỹ năng giao tiếp tốt, tư duy hỗ trợ khách hàng (customer-oriented mindset).
Chủ động, có trách nhiệm và tinh thần học hỏi.
Có khả năng giao tiếp tiếng Anh cơ bản là một lợi thế.
THU NHẬP
Mức lương cạnh tranh + phụ cấp dự án (gồm phụ cấp ca làm việc và chế độ nghỉ bù)
Tổng thu nhập lên tới 13 tháng lương/năm
Gói phúc lợi tiền mặt 9 triệu/năm vào các dịp Lễ, Tết, Sinh nhật Tập đoàn...
Xét tăng lương theo năng lực và kết quả công việc định kỳ 1 lần/năm.
CHẾ ĐỘ ĐÃI NGỘ
Đóng BHXH đầy đủ và BH sức khỏe CMC Care ngay khi ký Hợp đồng chính thức
Nghỉ phép: 12 ngày/ năm + 1 ngày nghỉ hưởng lương vào dịp sinh nhật bản thân
Được tham gia các chương trình đào tạo chuyên môn, nghiệp vụ từ cơ bản đến nâng cao.
Được trang bị laptop/thiết bị công nghệ trong quá trình làm việc
Môi trường trẻ, năng động và chuyên nghiệp
Tham gia Team building và các hoạt động văn hóa đa dạng
Được vinh danh các giải thưởng năm của Tập đoàn CMC, CMC TS và khen thưởng trên các thành tích xuất sắc (dự án, kinh doanh, quản trị)

job_description:

Provide support to end-users and troubleshoot hardware, software, and network issues

Perform basic administration of Windows OS, Windows Server, and Active Directory

Perform data backup, system updates, and regular virus scanning

location: Ho Chi Minh City, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
job_description:
MÔ TẢ CÔNG VIỆC
Vai Trò
Vận hành, triển khai, hỗ trợ và cải tiến hệ thống phần mềm của công ty nhằm đảm bảo hoạt động kinh doanh diễn ra liên tục, chính xác và hiệu quả.
Hỗ trợ người dùng (User) trong các nghiệp vụ nghiệp vụ: POS bán lẻ, hóa đơn điện tử, mua hàng, tồn kho,…
Tiếp nhận và xử lý ticket liên quan đến lỗi hệ thống phần mềm hoặc yêu cầu thay đổi nghiệp vụ.
Thực hiện cấu hình module POS/LS Retail theo yêu cầu được phê duyệt.
Thực hiện cài đặt giá bán lẻ, chương trình khuyến mãi cho hệ thống bán hàng
Phối hợp với bộ phận lập trình thực hiện các yêu cầu phát triển report hoặc tính năng mới
Phối hợp với vendor trong việc kiểm tra, sửa lỗi, cập nhật phiên bản hoặc phát triển tính năng mới.
Tham gia các dự án liên quan đến POS/ERP/ứng dụng nội bộ.
Viết tài liệu hướng dẫn người dùng (User Manual)
Đào tạo người dùng mới và đào tạo định kỳ.
Kiểm tra tính hợp lệ của dữ liệu master data.
Thực hiện các công việc khác theo yêu cầu công ty và Line Manager
Các công việc khác được giao bởi Line Manager và theo yêu cầu công ty
YÊU CẦU CÔNG VIỆC
Bằng cấp:
Tốt nghiệp Cao đẳng/ Đại học chuyên ngành Công nghệ thông tin.
Kinh nghiệm:
Ít nhất 1 năm kinh nghiệm vận hành hoặc triển khai hệ thống POS cho chuỗi bán lẻ.
Cẩn trọng và hiểu biết về nghiệp vụ bán hàng, ưu tiên có kinh nghiệm tại chuỗi bán lẻ thời trang.
Kỹ năng/ năng lực:
Hiểu rõ các nghiệp vụ vận hành trong chuỗi bán lẻ.
Sử dụng thành thạo các phần mềm: LS Retail, Sql Server
Biết sử dụng: Power BI, Oracle là một lợi thế.
Giao tiếp tốt, chủ động trong công việc.
QUYỀN LỢI
Chế độ đãi ngộ hấp dẫn: Mức lương cạnh tranh cùng lương 13 lương cố định.
Bảo hiểm sức khỏe
Phát triển sự nghiệp bền vững: Được đào tạo, đánh giá thường niên và có cơ hội luân chuyển nội bộ để mở rộng kỹ năng.
Ưu đãi dành riêng cho nhân viên: Giảm giá 20–50% sản phẩm DAFC và tham gia các sự kiện mua sắm nội bộ đặc biệt với nhiều ưu đãi độc quyền.
Môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp & sáng tạo: Không gian làm việc năng động, nơi bạn được khám phá và trải nghiệm thế giới thời trang xa xỉ.
Văn hóa gắn kết & tràn đầy năng lượng: Tham gia Happy Hours, Team building, tiệc cuối năm cùng nhiều hoạt động thú vị khác.
Trải nghiệm ngành hàng xa xỉ đẳng cấp: Cơ hội hiếm có để đồng hành cùng các thương hiệu quốc tế hàng đầu trong lĩnh vực thời trang cao cấp tại Việt Nam.

job_title: Da Nang Cabin Crew Opportunities (Dubai Based, Relocation Provided)
job_description:
Job Purpose
A personality that shines, the ability to adapt to any situation and make people feel at ease. These are a few of the qualities we’re looking for in our cabin crew.
As the face of Emirates, you’ll be the person customers turn to for help and direction when they fly with us, so you need to be friendly, observant and able to provide the right support.
Being a member of the cabin crew is so much more than a service role - safety is our highest priority. You’ll need to lead confidently and take control when it comes to managing aircraft services, security, and safety procedures. This comes from the world-class learning experience our crew receive at our state-of-the-art facility in Dubai.
Qualifications & Experience
Here are some other things we look for in our cabin crew:
You’ve had more than a year’s experience in hospitality/customer service
You have a positive attitude and the natural ability to provide excellent service in a team environment, dealing with people from many cultures
Your minimum qualification is high school graduate (Grade 12)
You need to be fluent in written and spoken English
You’re at least 160cm tall and can reach 212 cm while standing on tiptoes, to enable you to reach emergency equipment on all aircraft types
No visible tattoos while you’re in Emirates cabin crew uniform (without covering them with bandages or cosmetics)
As Emirates cabin crew, you’ll be based in Dubai and will need to meet the UAE's employment visa requirements
Aside from the requirements of the role, you should be determined to always perform to the highest standards, focus on being solution oriented, and be able to manage a demanding work schedule. You should have the ability to deliver an authentic experience to our customers. You’ll be culturally aware and reflect the Emirates personality - professional, empathetic, progressive, visionary and cosmopolitan.
Salary & Benefits
Your pay is made up of three components:
a fixed basic salary,
an hourly pay for operated flights and
an overseas meal allowance.
Basic salary = AED 4,980 / month,
Flying Pay = AED 69.60 / hour based on avg. 80-100 hours / month,
Average Total Pay = AED 11,244 / month (~USD 3,100, EUR 2,600 or GBP 2,280)
* These are approximate numbers for Grade II (Economy Class).
Meal allowances for night stops are credited to the salary in arrears the following month.
Hotel accommodation as well as transport to and from the airport is provided by the company.

Mô tả chi tiết công việc
Phụ Trách Toàn Bộ Các Hoạt Động Liên Quan Đến Hệ Thống Mạng, Các Trang Thiết Bị Điện Tử, Nghe Nhìn Trang Bị Tại Công Ty Và Cửa Hàng

location: Ho Chi Minh City, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
job_description:
1. Application Support
•     Provide first-level support for business applications.
•     Monitor application performance, availability, and user access.
•     Support daily operational activities related to ERP, CRM or other enterprise systems.
•     Support for Microsoft Windows, Microsoft 365, Outlook, Teams, and common business applications.
•     Support for IT team on staff onboarding, offboarding activities.
2. Business Process & User Support
•     Gather user requirements and understand business processes.
•     Support users in system usage, troubleshooting, and process improvement.
•     Conduct user training and prepare user guides/SOPs.
•     Assist departments in optimizing workflows using system functionalities.
3. System Administration & Maintenance
•     Coordinate application upgrades, patches, and configuration changes.
•     Perform testing (UAT/SIT) for new features or system enhancements.
•     Support data validation, migration, and system integration activities.
•     Monitor scheduled jobs, interfaces, and application logs.
4. Reporting & Data Management
•     Generate operational reports and dashboards.
•     Support data extraction and analysis requests.
•     Ensure data accuracy and consistency within applications.
•     Assist in maintaining master data governance processes.
5. Security & Compliance
•     Ensure applications comply with IT security and company policies.
•     Support audit activities and access reviews.
•     Maintain proper documentation for system changes and controls.
Requirements
•      English communication is a must.
•      Bachelor’s degree in IT, Computer Science, Business Information Systems, or related field.
•      1–3 years of experience in application support or business systems support.
•      Knowledge of:
o   ERP/CRM systems such as Microsoft Dynamics 365, SAP, Oracle, or similar
o   SQL basics and database concepts
o   Microsoft Excel and reporting tools
o   User access and role management
o   Ticketing/helpdesk systems
o   Knowledge and experience in AI are advantages.
•       Basic understanding of:
o   APIs and system integration
o   Power BI or reporting platforms
o   Software testing methodologies
•       Soft Skills:
o   Good analytical and problem-solving skills
o   Strong communication with business users
o   Ability to coordinate with multiple stakeholders
o   Attention to detail and documentation skills
o   Customer-oriented mindset
Benefits
•      Work in a regional, international environment
•      Competitive salary package with 13th‑month salary, performance‑based bonus
•      Insurance as Vietnam’s labor code & extra accident/medical insurance
•      Hybrid working model combining office‑based and remote working to support flexibility and performance
•      Benefit in kind, company trip

location: Ho Chi Minh City, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
job_description:
Mô tả công việc
Nhân viên IT
Cài đặt, vận hành, xử lý các sự cố phát sinh
Quản trị máy chủ, hệ thống máy tính, hệ thống mạng
Tốt nghiệp chuyên ngành liên quan
Kinh nghiệm 1-2 năm ở vị trí tương đương
Trung cấp

Số lượng: 1 người
Kinh nghiệm: 1 - 2 năm
Bằng cấp: Trung cấp trở lên
Cấp bậc: Nhân viên
Nơi làm việc: Đồng Nai
Thu nhập/ tháng: 10 - 15 Triệu
MÔ TẢ CÔNG VIỆC
Vị trí IT Help Desk đóng vai trò quan trọng trong việc hỗ trợ kỹ thuật cho người dùng cuối, bảo đảm hệ thống thông tin của tổ chức hoạt động ổn định và hiệu quả. Cụ thể, người giữ vị trí này sẽ chịu trách nhiệm giải quyết các vấn đề kỹ thuật, từ đơn giản đến phức tạp, qua điện thoại hoặc trực tiếp. Họ cũng sẽ cung cấp hướng dẫn và tư vấn cho người dùng về cách sử dụng các ứng dụng và phần mềm hiệu quả. Bên cạnh đó, IT Help Desk còn theo dõi và ghi chép các sự cố kỹ thuật để phân tích và cải thiện chất lượng hệ thống thông tin.
Xác định, chẩn đoán, giải quyết vấn đề của người sử dụng máy tính cá nhân, phần mềm máy tính và phần cứng, mạng, internet, e-mail, dial-in, các vấn đề truy cập mạng; và các vấn đề máy in, photo copy, điện thoại, camera…
Cung cấp hỗ trợ cài đặt, cấu hình cho người dùng các phần cứng máy tính để bàn, phần mềm, và thiết bị ngoại vi.
Vận hành và duy trì hệ thống server, mạng LAN, WAN, camera…
Sửa chữa đúng hạn các thiết bị hoặc bảo hành, bảo trì từ nhà cung cấp bên thứ ba theo thỏa thuận hợp đồng.
Chịu trách nhiệm bảo trì, sửa chữa các thiết bị máy tính, mạng toàn công ty. Thực hiện sửa chữa phần cứng máy tính, các thiết bị máy tính PC và các thiết bị ngoại vi không được thỏa thuận bảo dưỡng của bên thứ ba nhà cung cấp.
Giúp cài đặt mạng nội bộ, hệ thống cáp và các thiết bị như card mạng, hub và switch.
Hỗ trợ, hướng dẫn người dùng xử lý các vấn đề liên quan đến IT. Phối hợp với các kỹ thuật viên khác trong việc tạo ra tài liệu liệu hướng dẫn cho người dùng cuối câu hỏi thường gặp (FAQs).
Kiểm kê, quản lý tài sản cố định & Các công việc khác theo yêu cầu của cấp trên.
Yêu Cầu Công Việc
Có kinh nghiệm ít nhất 1 năm, tốt nghiệp trung cấp, cao đẳng công nghệ thông tin trở lên
Có kiến thức windows server, hệ thống camera, Database
Có kiến thức chuyên môn cơ bản về các hệ thống máy chủ, các hệ điều hành
Có kiến thức về hệ thống mạng LAN/WAN, cấu hình các thiết bị mạng
Có khả năng làm việc độc lập hoặc làm việc theo nhóm tốt, luôn chủ động trong công việc, có tinh thần trách nhiệm và tính kỷ luật cao
Có thể đọc - hiểu & làm báo cáo bằng Tiếng anh
ĐỊA ĐIỂM & THỜI GIAN LÀM VIỆC:
Địa điểm: Lô II - 11, KCN Hố Nai, Xã Hố Nai 3, Huyện Trảng Bom, Tỉnh Đồng Nai, Việt Nam
Thời gian làm việc: 7:30 - 16:30 (Thứ 2 - Thứ 7), nghỉ 2 ngày thứ 7 trong tháng
PHÚC LỢI
Đóng BHXH trên tổng tiền lương
Bảo hiểm tai nạn 24/24 cho nhân viên
Nghỉ phép, nghỉ lễ và ngày thành lập công ty theo quy định
Cung cấp bữa sáng và bữa trưa tại các nhà máy
Tặng quà sinh nhật và quà các ngày lễ trong năm

with at least 1 year of experience in IT Support or Service Delivery. The ideal candidate will be responsible for supporting end-users, maintaining IT infrastructure, troubleshooting hardware/software issues, managing user accounts, and ensuring smooth daily IT operations.

A keen eye for detail. You will love working here!

job_title: Opportunities at SCG – All Functions (Vietnam Office)
location: Ho Chi Minh City Metropolitan Area
job_description:
SCG Vietnam – Build the Future with Us
Driving Vietnam’s Growth with Innovation and Excellence
For over a century, SCG has led industrial innovation across ASEAN, shaping the future of construction, materials science, packaging, and sustainability. Vietnam, one of the region’s fastest-growing economies, is central to SCG’s long-term vision. With a strong presence in multiple industries, we are committed to delivering high-quality solutions, developing local talent, and investing in sustainable growth.
Our operations in Vietnam cover key business sectors:
SCG Cement-Building Materials
– Providing innovative and durable construction solutions to support Vietnam’s rapid urbanization and infrastructure expansion.
SCG Chemicals
– Advancing polymer and chemical solutions for industrial applications while driving environmental responsibility.
SCG Packaging
– Delivering sustainable packaging solutions to meet the needs of Vietnam’s growing consumer and manufacturing sectors.
SCG International
– Enhancing Vietnam’s trade networks through industrial sourcing, supply chain solutions, and cross-border partnerships.
Vietnam’s rapid economic transformation presents exceptional opportunities for skilled professionals. SCG is looking for high-potential individuals to be part of this journey, driving progress and shaping industries.
Why SCG? A Workplace Designed for Growth
Career Development Without Limits
SCG is more than a workplace—it is a gateway to a
regional and global career.
Employees gain exposure to
cross-border projects, cutting-edge innovations, and international business networks.
Accelerated Professional Growth
SCG actively invests in
leadership training, mentorship programs, and career mobility.
High-performing employees are fast-tracked into key positions, ensuring that growth is based on
capability, not tenure.
Innovation & Sustainability at the Core
SCG is at the forefront of
smart manufacturing, digital transformation, renewable energy, and circular economy initiatives.
Employees contribute to projects that
drive long-term impact
on industries and communities.
A Collaborative & Inclusive Work Environment
SCG Vietnam fosters a workplace where diverse perspectives and
team-driven success
lead to
continuous improvement and innovation.
Employees are empowered to share ideas, take initiative, and work alongside leading industry professionals.
Competitive Compensation & Long-Term Stability
SCG offers:
Market-competitive salary packages and performance-based rewards.
Career mobility across SCG’s operations in Vietnam, Thailand, and other ASEAN countries.
Continuous learning opportunities, upskilling programs, and industry-leading mentorship.
Find Your Place at SCG Vietnam
SCG is hiring across multiple disciplines, including:
Engineering & Manufacturing
– Mechanical, Chemical, Electrical, and Industrial Engineering.
Business & Commercial
– Supply Chain, Procurement, Trade, and Business Strategy.
Digital & Technology
– AI, Cybersecurity, Cloud Computing, Data Science, and Software Development.
Branding & Marketing
– Consumer Insights, Digital Marketing, and Product Innovation.
Finance & Risk Management
– Accounting, Investment, Internal Audit.
Sustainability & Renewable Energy
– Circular Economy, Green Manufacturing, and Renewable Energy Solutions.
And many more!
Not sure where you fit?
Apply anyway—SCG values skills, ambition, and problem-solving capabilities over rigid qualifications.
Build Your Career with SCG Vietnam
Vietnam’s industries are evolving rapidly, and SCG is shaping that transformation. If you want to work on projects that drive real-world impact, foster sustainability, and push the boundaries of innovation, this is your opportunity.
Apply today and take the next step toward an exciting career with SCG.
*While we strive to match opportunities based on individual preferences and expertise, availability may vary depending on business needs. However, we will always do our best to align opportunities with your aspirations and capabilities.

Our client
, a leading technology company in Vietnam, is undergoing a major transformation. They are expanding beyond traditional software to offer AI‑as‑a‑Service and Agent‑as‑a‑Service, serving hundreds of thousands of enterprises, government agencies, and business households.
They are seeking a
CTO
who can:
Drive long‑term technology strategy to position the company as a regional leader in AI and Agentic AI.
Build large‑scale AI and data platforms that create sustainable competitive advantages.
Modernize system architecture to serve millions of users with high reliability and performance.
Develop a strong engineering organization that scales quickly, delivers fast, and continuously learns.
I. KEY RESPONSIBILITIES
Provide leadership and direction for technology strategy, roadmap, system architecture, and data infrastructure.
Ensure the company remains a technology leader in Vietnam and the region.
Proactively adopt global technology trends to create business competitive advantages and improve customer operational efficiency.
II. CORE FUNCTIONS
1. AI Strategy
Define strategic direction, research, and execution to keep AI solutions cutting‑edge.
Deliver clear, practical value to customers through AI applications.
2. Data Governance
Build and manage a comprehensive data ecosystem (collection, storage, utilization).
Use data as the foundation for AI development and to support leadership decision‑making.
3. System Architecture
Design and standardize modern system architecture.
Ensure system components work cohesively with strong scalability and high performance.
4. Team Development
Foster a continuous learning culture.
Standardize development processes, competency frameworks, and training programs.
Elevate the overall technical capability of the organization.
III. CANDIDATE PROFILE
A. Required Qualifications
Strong intelligence, logical thinking, creativity, and decisiveness.
Minimum 5 years of experience as a CTO (or equivalent) in large technology companies (500+ software engineers), either domestic or international.
Proven experience operating systems that serve millions of users and hundreds of thousands of businesses.
Deep understanding of AI and hands‑on experience building AI products or transforming software products with AI to deliver real user value.
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
Fluent English, with demonstrated experience presenting and speaking at conferences or seminars.
B. Preferred Qualifications
Master's or PhD in Computer Science, IT, or related fields.
Experience working in a product‑driven environment.
IV. BENEFITS & OPPORTUNITIES
1. Competitive Compensation
Highly competitive salary and bonus based on capability and business performance.
Attractive long‑term incentive policies (to be discussed during interviews).
2. Career Growth
Opportunity to learn, research, and apply world‑leading technologies at a top product company in Vietnam.
Play a key role in shaping long‑term technology strategy and the product ecosystem.
Work on complex, large‑scale systems serving millions of users.
Tackle challenging problems in advanced technology and architecture.
3. Global Exposure
Represent the company in collaboration with leading domestic and international experts.
Working location:
Hanoi, Viet Nam
Contact:
ngocyen@cnk-consulting.com.vn / 0399 319 360 (Zalo/Call)
Note:
We appreciate all applications; however, only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

MÔ TẢ CÔNG VIỆC
Xử lý sự cố, chẩn đoán, giải quyết các vấn đề liên quan đến người dùng (End-user).

Khắc phục các lỗi liên quan đến phần cứng PC, laptop, máy in, photocopy, scan.
Xử lý sự cố liên quan mạng (Internet, LAN, Printer, Camera).
Xử lý lỗi liên quan máy chấm công (timekeeper), thiết bị mạng, UPS.
Chuẩn bị máy tính, thiết bị cho phòng họp, hội nghị.
Sử dụng hệ thống quản lý ticket.
Backup dữ liệu người dùng.
Theo dõi tình trạng mực in, linh kiện hư hỏng, báo cáo mua mới thay thế.
Cập nhật tài liệu IT (khi được yêu cầu).
Cập nhật tài liệu hướng dẫn người dùng (khi được yêu cầu).
Báo cáo định kỳ và đề xuất phương án tối ưu.
Tham gia các khóa đạo tạo nâng cao kỹ năng chuyên môn, nghiệp vụ.
YÊU CẦU ỨNG VIÊN

Kiến thức: CNTT + hỗ trợ người dùng.

Kỹ năng giao tiếp tốt trong đội nhóm, giữa các phòng ban.
QUYỀN LỢI ỨNG VIÊN
THU NHẬP

Thưởng 1 tháng lương
Gói phúc lợi tiền mặt 9 triệu/năm vào các dịp Lễ, Tết, Sinh nhật Tập đoàn...
Xét tăng lương theo năng lực và kết quả công việc định kỳ 1 lần/năm. Hoặc tăng lương đột xuất theo hiệu quả công việc.
CHẾ ĐỘ ĐÀO TẠO VÀ PHÁT TRIỂN
Đài thọ 100% chi phí tham gia các khóa học, thi chứng chỉ CNTT Quốc tế.

job_description:
Location: Ho Chi Minh
Expired date: 31/03/2026
Team: Engineering
About Urbox
UrBox is Vietnam’s leading digital gifting & loyalty platform that enables businesses to integrate their reward & loyalty programs with an ever-growing network of more than 350 brands & 20,000 accepted online and offline stores in Vietnam.
UrBox has the widest network of clients in loyalty in Vietnam and provides loyalty & reward solutions to many big organizations in the aviation, banking, FMCG, Insurance, Real Estate industries and more.
Key Responsibilities
IT Helpdesk Leader
is responsible for leading the IT Helpdesk team, ensuring the company’s IT systems operate smoothly and securely. The role involves managing support operations, overseeing IT infrastructure, coordinating internal IT services, and supporting business operations, including Google Workspace administration.
Lead and manage the IT Helpdesk team, assign tasks, and monitor performance.
Receive, prioritize, track, and ensure timely resolution of technical support requests from departments.
Troubleshoot and provide advanced support for hardware (computers, printers, scanners) and network (LAN/WAN) issues.
Oversee installation, configuration, and upgrade of software and systems.
Ensure effective use, operation, and availability of IT equipment across the company.
Plan and perform periodic maintenance of IT systems and devices.

Supervise IT onboarding (equipment preparation, account setup, user guidance) and offboarding (equipment and account recovery) processes.

Our client
, a leading technology company in Vietnam, is undergoing a major transformation. They are expanding beyond traditional software to offer AI‑as‑a‑Service and Agent‑as‑a‑Service, serving hundreds of thousands of enterprises, government agencies, and business households.
They are seeking a
CTO
who can:
Drive long‑term technology strategy to position the company as a regional leader in AI and Agentic AI.
Build large‑scale AI and data platforms that create sustainable competitive advantages.
Modernize system architecture to serve millions of users with high reliability and performance.
Develop a strong engineering organization that scales quickly, delivers fast, and continuously learns.
I. KEY RESPONSIBILITIES
Provide leadership and direction for technology strategy, roadmap, system architecture, and data infrastructure.
Ensure the company remains a technology leader in Vietnam and the region.
Proactively adopt global technology trends to create business competitive advantages and improve customer operational efficiency.
II. CORE FUNCTIONS
1. AI Strategy
Define strategic direction, research, and execution to keep AI solutions cutting‑edge.
Deliver clear, practical value to customers through AI applications.
2. Data Governance
Build and manage a comprehensive data ecosystem (collection, storage, utilization).
Use data as the foundation for AI development and to support leadership decision‑making.
3. System Architecture
Design and standardize modern system architecture.
Ensure system components work cohesively with strong scalability and high performance.
4. Team Development
Foster a continuous learning culture.
Standardize development processes, competency frameworks, and training programs.
Elevate the overall technical capability of the organization.
III. CANDIDATE PROFILE
A. Required Qualifications
Strong intelligence, logical thinking, creativity, and decisiveness.
Minimum 5 years of experience as a CTO (or equivalent) in large technology companies (500+ software engineers), either domestic or international.
Proven experience operating systems that serve millions of users and hundreds of thousands of businesses.
Deep understanding of AI and hands‑on experience building AI products or transforming software products with AI to deliver real user value.
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
Fluent English, with demonstrated experience presenting and speaking at conferences or seminars.
B. Preferred Qualifications
Master's or PhD in Computer Science, IT, or related fields.
Experience working in a product‑driven environment.
IV. BENEFITS & OPPORTUNITIES
1. Competitive Compensation
Highly competitive salary and bonus based on capability and business performance.
Attractive long‑term incentive policies (to be discussed during interviews).
2. Career Growth
Opportunity to learn, research, and apply world‑leading technologies at a top product company in Vietnam.
Play a key role in shaping long‑term technology strategy and the product ecosystem.
Work on complex, large‑scale systems serving millions of users.
Tackle challenging problems in advanced technology and architecture.
3. Global Exposure
Represent the company in collaboration with leading domestic and international experts.
Working location:
Hanoi, Viet Nam
Contact:
dat@cnk-consulting.com.vn / 0328031953 (Zalo/Call)

We appreciate all applications; however, only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Sẵn sàng làm việc theo ca nếu có yêu cầu.

job_description:
Bouygues Construction IT Vietnam is a part of Bouygues Construction IT, a trusted partner for the business lines which provides competitiveness of the Bouygues Construction Group and promotes its digital transformation.
As an IT Local Support, you will be the first point of contact for end users, providing hands-on technical support and ensuring the reliability of local IT systems and infrastructure. Working closely with global IT teams in Vietnam and Morocco, you will manage daily operations, troubleshoot issues, and maintain hardware, software, and network stability in line with the company’s IT standards.
Your Main Responsibilities Will Be
Provide Level 1–2 system and application support to end users.
Perform local system administration (server/network) at Level 1–2.
Troubleshoot and resolve hardware issues.
Ensure the smooth operation of computers, mobile devices, network equipment, and printers, as well as end-users’ requirements in lie with user’s requirements and company policies.
Support internal & external meetings, including video conferencing, MS Teams Meeting, and presentation.
Manage IT hardware inventory and coordinate maintenance.
Monitor backups and network infrastructure to ensure system reliability.
Mandatory
OUR REQUIREMENTS:
Solid understanding of system and network administration, with 3 years of hands-on experience.
Proven expertise in managing and troubleshooting network devices (switches, routers, LAN, VPN), with the ability to identify and isolate issues at the device, port, or protocol level.
Proficient in Microsoft environments, including Office 365, Active Directory, Outlook, Windows 10, SCCM, and Intune.
Fluent in English; proficiency in French is a strong plus.
General Skills
Strong communication skills; friendly and service-oriented attitude.
Organized, methodical, and detail-focused.
Team player with the ability to work independently.
Committed to quality, reliability, and continuous improvement.
Responsible, proactive, and customer-focused.

Individual empowerment.

Dell laptop and external monitor for your work.

Sport, personal activities sponsor.

job_description:
Description
The Junior IT Technician is a crucial role focused on providing prompt and effective direct technical support to all employees by maintaining the stability of IT systems and swiftly resolving issues related to hardware, software, and network connectivity, primarily utilizing a ticketing system. Key responsibilities include system and network administration, IT asset management with inventory and lifecycle tracking, ensuring compliance with IT policies and security protocols, and maintaining accurate IT documentation.
Key Responsibilities:
End-User Support: Handle requests via the ticketing system; diagnose and troubleshoot hardware, software, and network issues for laptops, printers, and peripherals.
System & Network Administration: Manage user accounts and access permissions; perform routine maintenance on network devices and servers; coordinate with vendors for repairs when necessary.
Asset Management: Monitor the full lifecycle of IT assets (procurement, issuance, maintenance, recovery); conduct monthly inventories and comply with the company's Asset Management SOP.
Documentation & Reporting: Update technical documentation and FAQs; provide periodic reports on ticket resolution status and recurring incidents to improve service quality.
Compliance & Security: Ensure adherence to IT security policies and information security standards; report any potential security risks immediately.
User Training: Guide employees on IT policies and self-service tools; notify staff regarding scheduled system maintenance.
Qualifications:
Bachelor's or Associate's degree in Information Technology or a related field.
Willingness to work in shifts, including weekends or holidays as required (rotating shift, 40 hours/week).
Proficient in Windows 10, 11, and Windows Server; knowledgeable in computer hardware and on-premise network infrastructure.
Preference given to candidates with experience providing technical support via multiple channels (email, chat, phone).
Excellent communication and problem-solving skills; ability to work both independently and as part of a team.
English B1 - Oral and written comprehension required
Attitude: Responsible, proactive, and possessing strong professional ethics.

TELUS Digital is the customer experience transformation partner to the world's most admired brands. Our diverse team weaves data, technology, and human ingenuity to deliver differentiated customer journeys, drive operational effectiveness, and scale AI solutions with meaningful value and positive impact.

Our solutions span Data & AI, Digital Experience & IT, CX Management and Trust & Safety. At the core of our innovation is Fuel iX™, an enterprise-grade generative AI platform that helps clients safely access and optimize leading LLMs to scale their own AI from pilot to production.

job_title: Data Center Technician - Da Nang - On-site
location: Đà Nang, Da Nang City, Vietnam
job_description:
Reboot Monkey is a global leader in IT solutions, specializing in data center management that simplifies your IT operations. We provide hosting space, future-proof upgrades, and 24/7 support through our smart or remote hands, ensuring seamless, secure, and sustainable service. Our fully remote, round-the-clock management frees businesses from supervision hassles, setting new benchmarks in data center solutions. We’re seeking skilled Freelance Data Center Technicians to join our growing team. If you have expertise in data center operations and want flexible work, we’d love to hear from you.
Job Overview:
As a Freelance Data Center Technician,
you will play a key role in delivering on-demand support to our global data centers. Your responsibilities will include hardware installation, troubleshooting complex issues, and managing network operations, ensuring optimal performance and reliability. We’re looking for someone with deep expertise in data center equipment and software who can work independently while collaborating with remote teams. In this role, you’ll be essential to maintaining smooth, secure, and efficient data center operations, contributing to our high standards of service excellence.
Key Responsibilities:
Install, configure, and maintain servers, networking equipment, and other hardware to ensure optimal performance and maximum uptime, facilitating seamless operations within the data center.
Monitor data center operations both remotely and on-site, quickly diagnosing and resolving hardware, software, and connectivity issues to minimize downtime and maintain service reliability.
Configure, manage, and troubleshoot networking devices, including Cisco and Juniper routers, switches, and firewalls, to ensure secure and efficient network operations that align with organizational standards.
Manage and troubleshoot both Linux and Windows-based systems, performing essential updates, patches, and security enhancements to keep systems secure and up-to-date.
Document all installations, repairs, maintenance tasks, and system performance, providing comprehensive reports to the remote management team to ensure transparency and accountability in operations.
Implement and maintain security protocols to protect the integrity of the data center infrastructure, ensuring compliance with industry standards and best practices for data security.
Collaborate with remote IT teams, vendors, and stakeholders to enhance data center operations, actively participating in the planning and execution of projects that drive efficiency and innovation.
What We Offer:
Flexibility: Work around your existing freelance or permanent job. You choose the tickets you want to pick up, with no minimum hour commitment.
Professional Environment: Join a professional work environment where you can reconnect with the practical side of IT.
Competitive Compensation: We offer competitive rewards for your compensation and efforts.
Growth Opportunities: Work with compelling clients and seize opportunities to grow in your field.
Data center or IT infrastructure experience
Server hardware and networking knowledge
Reliable and professional with strong communication
Proximity to local data center facilities
Flexible schedule for on-call/emergency work

Our client
, a leading technology company in Vietnam, is undergoing a major transformation. They are expanding beyond traditional software to offer AI‑as‑a‑Service and Agent‑as‑a‑Service, serving hundreds of thousands of enterprises, government agencies, and business households.
They are seeking a
CTO
who can:
Drive long‑term technology strategy to position the company as a regional leader in AI and Agentic AI.
Build large‑scale AI and data platforms that create sustainable competitive advantages.
Modernize system architecture to serve millions of users with high reliability and performance.
Develop a strong engineering organization that scales quickly, delivers fast, and continuously learns.
I. KEY RESPONSIBILITIES
Provide leadership and direction for technology strategy, roadmap, system architecture, and data infrastructure.
Ensure the company remains a technology leader in Vietnam and the region.
Proactively adopt global technology trends to create business competitive advantages and improve customer operational efficiency.
II. CORE FUNCTIONS
1. AI Strategy
Define strategic direction, research, and execution to keep AI solutions cutting‑edge.
Deliver clear, practical value to customers through AI applications.
2. Data Governance
Build and manage a comprehensive data ecosystem (collection, storage, utilization).
Use data as the foundation for AI development and to support leadership decision‑making.
3. System Architecture
Design and standardize modern system architecture.
Ensure system components work cohesively with strong scalability and high performance.
4. Team Development
Foster a continuous learning culture.
Standardize development processes, competency frameworks, and training programs.
Elevate the overall technical capability of the organization.
III. CANDIDATE PROFILE
A. Required Qualifications
Strong intelligence, logical thinking, creativity, and decisiveness.
Minimum 5 years of experience as a CTO (or equivalent) in large technology companies (500+ software engineers), either domestic or international.
Proven experience operating systems that serve millions of users and hundreds of thousands of businesses.
Deep understanding of AI and hands‑on experience building AI products or transforming software products with AI to deliver real user value.
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
Fluent English, with demonstrated experience presenting and speaking at conferences or seminars.
B. Preferred Qualifications
Master's or PhD in Computer Science, IT, or related fields.
Experience working in a product‑driven environment.
IV. BENEFITS & OPPORTUNITIES
1. Competitive Compensation
Highly competitive salary and bonus based on capability and business performance.
Attractive long‑term incentive policies (to be discussed during interviews).
2. Career Growth
Opportunity to learn, research, and apply world‑leading technologies at a top product company in Vietnam.
Play a key role in shaping long‑term technology strategy and the product ecosystem.
Work on complex, large‑scale systems serving millions of users.
Tackle challenging problems in advanced technology and architecture.
3. Global Exposure
Represent the company in collaboration with leading domestic and international experts.
Working location:
Hanoi, Viet Nam

ngochien@cnk-consulting.com.vn / 0941918526 (Zalo/Call)

job_title: Customer Solutions Consultant, Platform, Google Cloud
job_description:
Please visit this Google Careers posting for the Vietnamese-translated version of this role.
Note: Google's hybrid workplace includes remote roles.
Remote location: Vietnam.
Minimum qualifications:
Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
6 years of experience with cloud native architecture in a customer-facing or support role.
Experience with cloud engineering, on-premise engineering, virtualization, or containerization platforms.
Experience engaging with, or presenting to, technical stakeholders or executive leaders.
Experience in programming languages, debugging, systems design, prototyping, demos, or customer workshops.
Preferred qualifications:
Experience promoting technical solutions in Cloud AI.
Experience driving the entire business cycle (e.g., defining the delivery and consumption plan and transitioning it for execution).
Experience with security concepts (e.g., encryption, identity management, access control, attack vectors).
Experience building technical strategies to uncover new workloads with customers.
Experience migrating applications and services to cloud platforms.
About The Job
The Google Cloud Platform team helps customers transform and build what's next for their business — all with technology built in the cloud. Our products are developed for security, reliability and scalability, running the full stack from infrastructure to applications to devices and hardware. Our teams are dedicated to helping our customers — developers, small and large businesses, educational institutions and government agencies — see the benefits of our technology come to life. As part of an entrepreneurial team in this rapidly growing business, you will play a key role in understanding the needs of our customers and help shape the future of businesses of all sizes use technology to connect with customers, employees and partners.
As a Platform Customer Solutions Consultant, you will partner with sales teams to differentiate Google Cloud Platform (GCP) to the customers and serve as the customer’s primary technical partner and advisor, engaging in technical-led conversations to understand business issues. You will troubleshoot technical questions and roadblocks, engage in proofs-of-concepts and demos, and use the expertise to architect cross-pillar cloud solutions that solve business issues. You will drive the technical win and define the delivery and consumption plans to engage with technical and business leaders, and present solutions. You will focus on identifying, pursuing, and winning new business workloads and driving engagement within existing ones.
Google Cloud accelerates every organization’s ability to digitally transform its business and industry. We deliver enterprise-grade solutions that leverage Google’s technology, and tools that help developers build more sustainably. Customers in more than 200 countries and territories turn to Google Cloud as their trusted partner to enable growth and solve their most critical business problems.
Responsibilities
Develop and own the technical account plan and strategy, participate in planning and support the business goals.
Combine sales, programming, and solutions architecture expertise to prove the value of Google Cloud Platform (GCP) across the portfolio through demos, pilots and workshops.
Architect cross-pillar solutions, drive technical wins, and define initial delivery plans for customers, and continue to lead the technical engagement in the solution phase.
Facilitate the post-sales transition by supporting pricing activities and transitioning the final delivery plan to implementation teams.
Maintain awareness of progress against the delivery plan, provide support to cross-functional teams during ramp, delivery, migration or implementation phases.
Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

job_title: Client Success Representative (Remote within APAC region, Contract)
job_description:
OUR HIRING PROCESS:
We will review your application against our job requirements. We do not employ machine learning technologies during this phase as we believe every human deserves attention from another human. We do not think machines can evaluate your application quite like our seasoned recruiting professionals—every person is unique. We promise to give your candidacy a fair and detailed assessment.
We may then invite you to submit a video interview for the review of the hiring manager. This video interview is often followed by a test or short project that allows us to determine whether you will be a good fit for the team.
At this point, we will invite you to interview with our hiring manager and/or the interview team. Please note: We do not conduct interviews via text message, Telegram, etc. and we never hire anyone into our organization without having met you face-to-face (or via Zoom). You will be invited to come to a live meeting or Zoom, where you will meet our INFUSE team.
From there on, it’s decision time! If you are still excited to join INFUSE and we like you as much, we will have a conversation about your offer. We do not make offers without giving you the opportunity to speak with us live.
INFUSE is committed to complying with applicable data privacy and security laws and regulations. For more information, please see our Privacy Policy
Are you driven by the desire to deliver exceptional client experiences and thrive in a dynamic environment? At INFUSE, we're seeking a passionate Client Success Specialist to join our team, where your efforts directly contribute to our clients' satisfaction and our company's success. This position offers an enriching path to professional growth and the unique opportunity to work with a variety of industries, ensuring no two days are the same. INFUSE has built a reputation as a beloved employer by prioritizing employee satisfaction and creating a workplace where everyone feels valued and connected. Joining our team means becoming part of a supportive community that celebrates every success and encourages continuous improvement. You'll discover how our employees love their jobs, driven by the meaningful connections they make and the positive impact they have on our clients' businesses.
Key Responsibilities
Build and maintain strong, long-lasting client relationships
Ensure the timely and successful delivery of our solutions according to client needs and objectives
Communicate clearly the progress of monthly/quarterly initiatives to internal and external stakeholders
Identify and grow opportunities within the territory and collaborate with sales teams to ensure growth attainment
Assist with challenging client requests or issue escalations as needed
Provide assistance across a variety of administrative and operational tasks, such as data entry, updating internal systems, or managing schedules.
Requirements
Proven track record of managing client relationships, preferably in a related field such as hospitality, client success, or sales

Reboot Monkey is a global leader in IT solutions, specializing in data center management that simplifies your IT operations. As a Freelance Data Center Technician,
you will play a key role in delivering on-demand support to our global data centers. Your responsibilities will include hardware installation, troubleshooting complex issues, and managing network operations, ensuring optimal performance and reliability. We’re looking for someone with deep expertise in data center equipment and software who can work independently while collaborating with remote teams. Install, configure, and maintain servers, networking equipment, and other hardware to ensure optimal performance and maximum uptime, facilitating seamless operations within the data center.

Flexibility to work outside regular hours, including nights and weekends if required.

Strong problem-solving skills, with the ability to work independently and remotely.
Excellent communication skills for collaboration with remote teams.

Báo cáo cho: IT Manager
Thời gian làm việc:
Từ Thứ Hai đến Thứ Sáu
Nam tốt nghiệp Cao đẳng, Đại học chuyên ngành IT hoặc kỹ thuật liên quan.
Độ tuổi: 24 – 40 tuổi.
Có ít nhất 03 năm kinh nghiệm làm việc trong lĩnh vực IT, quản trị hệ thống và hỗ trợ người dùng, ưu tiên có chứng chỉ quản trị hệ thống MCSA, CCNA.
Có kinh nghiệm triển khai hệ thống mạng từ đầu. Trung thực, có tinh thần trách nhiệm và tận tâm với công việc, có tư duy thay đổi, sáng tạo và tối ưu trong công việc.
Có khả năng làm việc độc lập/làm việc nhóm liên quan đến thiết kế, triển khai xây dựng hệ thống mạng và các dịch vụ CNTT trong doanh nghiệp lớn/nhiều chi nhánh.
Công việc>
Cài đặt, thiết lập từ đầu và quản trị hệ thống mạng của Tập đoàn và các Công ty thành viên. Hệ thống cơ bản bao gồm:
Máy chủ ảo hóa (Windows hoặc Linux server, VPS , Cloud server…).
Các máy trạm (Windows 7 đến windows 11)
Các thiết bị mạng (Firewall, Switch, SAN, NAS, Wifi, kết nối Internet, VPN…)
Cài đặt, cấu hình máy chủ, máy trạm, thiết bị mạng, hệ thống backup, thiết bị ngoại vi và các phần mềm ứng dụng.
Nghiên cứu các giải pháp mới: AI, Ảo hóa, Bảo mật, Clouds, data center, giám sát hệ thống từ xa …
Hỗ trợ người dùng trong một số trường hợp liên quan đến hệ thống, tư duy giảm thiểu tối đa lỗi phát sinh và không có lỗi lặp lại.
Quyền lợi>
Được làm việc trong môi trường năng động, top 1 về sản phẩm giống cây trồng tại Việt Nam, tiếp cận và triển khai từ đầu với mô hình mạng và các giải pháp CNTT cung cấp cho người dùng.
Có nhiều cơ hội học hỏi phát triển chuyên môn, kỹ thuật, kỹ năng quản lý dự án, AI, … và nhiều kiến thức khác.
Thưởng các dịp lễ, Tết;
Chế độ bảo hiểm theo quy định của pháp luật.
Cơ hội thăng tiến cao theo định hướng phát triển CNTT của tập đoàn theo hướng hiện đại, chuyên nghiệp.
Ứng tuyển vị trí này>

Báo cáo cho: IT Manager
Thời gian làm việc:
Từ Thứ Hai đến Thứ Sáu
Nam tốt nghiệp Cao đẳng, Đại học chuyên ngành IT hoặc kỹ thuật liên quan.
Độ tuổi: 24 – 40 tuổi.
Có ít nhất 03 năm kinh nghiệm làm việc trong lĩnh vực IT, quản trị hệ thống và hỗ trợ người dùng, ưu tiên có chứng chỉ quản trị hệ thống MCSA, CCNA.
Có kinh nghiệm triển khai hệ thống mạng từ đầu. Trung thực, có tinh thần trách nhiệm và tận tâm với công việc, có tư duy thay đổi, sáng tạo và tối ưu trong công việc.
Có khả năng làm việc độc lập/làm việc nhóm liên quan đến thiết kế, triển khai xây dựng hệ thống mạng và các dịch vụ CNTT trong doanh nghiệp lớn/nhiều chi nhánh.
Công việc>
Cài đặt, thiết lập từ đầu và quản trị hệ thống mạng của Tập đoàn và các Công ty thành viên. Hệ thống cơ bản bao gồm:
Máy chủ ảo hóa (Windows hoặc Linux server, VPS , Cloud server…).
Các máy trạm (Windows 7 đến windows 11)
Các thiết bị mạng (Firewall, Switch, SAN, NAS, Wifi, kết nối Internet, VPN…)
Cài đặt, cấu hình máy chủ, máy trạm, thiết bị mạng, hệ thống backup, thiết bị ngoại vi và các phần mềm ứng dụng.
Nghiên cứu các giải pháp mới: AI, Ảo hóa, Bảo mật, Clouds, data center, giám sát hệ thống từ xa …
Hỗ trợ người dùng trong một số trường hợp liên quan đến hệ thống, tư duy giảm thiểu tối đa lỗi phát sinh và không có lỗi lặp lại.
Quyền lợi>
Được làm việc trong môi trường năng động, top 1 về sản phẩm giống cây trồng tại Việt Nam, tiếp cận và triển khai từ đầu với mô hình mạng và các giải pháp CNTT cung cấp cho người dùng.
Có nhiều cơ hội học hỏi phát triển chuyên môn, kỹ thuật, kỹ năng quản lý dự án, AI, … và nhiều kiến thức khác.
Thưởng các dịp lễ, Tết;
Chế độ bảo hiểm theo quy định của pháp luật.
Cơ hội thăng tiến cao theo định hướng phát triển CNTT của tập đoàn theo hướng hiện đại, chuyên nghiệp.

Are you passionate about solving complex technical problems and providing world-class support to customers? We're seeking a dynamic
Technical Support Engineer (TSE)
to join our team! In this role, you will collaborate closely with our customers, distribution partners, and sales teams to provide technical guidance, product recommendations, and innovative solutions in line with market needs. If you're a hands-on problem solver with a background in technical support, we want to hear from you!
Why You’ll Love Working With Us:
Innovative Environment:
Be part of a forward-thinking company that values creativity and innovation.
Build your expertise:
Enjoy learning opportunities for professional development and build your field expertise
Impactful Work:
Make a significant impact in a rapidly growing market.
Competitive Benefits:
Receive a competitive salary and comprehensive benefits package.
Key Responsibilities:
Assists the sales team in various segments (Electronics, Automotive, Industrial Trade& Converter, Home Appliance, Electrical System and Printing and Packaging solution) in presenting and supporting technical aspects of the selling process through customer consultations, application test management and solution recommendation including product Spec-in activities.
Actively adopts and leverages use of AI in enhancing technical supports and speed in responding and supporting the customers.
To handle technical inquiry including qulity issue related to tesa product and application.
Provides training support to customers on product introduction/process solutions/ roll out and application knowledge.
Provides training support to internal sales team on technical aspects-adhesive tape, product introduction and application knowledge.
Provides reports on activities on a focus projects update on a monthly basis as stipulated by management.
Handling the projects assigned by Manager.
Skills and Knowledge:
Bachelor's or Master’s degree in Chemistry, Mechanical or equivalent.
Minimum 3-5 years of experience in technical sales support and customer consultancy in industrial consumables and investment goods.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Proficiency in English with excellent written and verbal communication skills.
High-quality technical support and strong customer relationship skills.
Collaborative and inclusive team player.
Ability to manage multiple tasks and adapt to changing priorities.
Openness and integrity.
Assertiveness and persuasiveness.
Logical thinking and problem-solving.
Strong interpersonal and communication skills.
Good time-management skills and tolerance for multi-tasking.
Demonstrated openness and ability to use AI-enabled and digital tools productively and responsibly in the workplace.
Understanding of the need for human validation, data protection, confidentiality, and ethical use when applying AI in business activities.

Mô tả công việc:
·       Hỗ trợ xử lý kỹ thuật khi nhận thông tin từ khách hàng.
·       Thực hiện sửa chữa các phần cứng/phần mềm kịp thời và nâng cấp phần cứng/phần mềm theo yêu cầu.
·       Thực hiện một số công việc khác theo sự phân công của cấp trên.
Yêu cầu ứng viên:
·       Tốt nghiệp chuyên ngành Công nghệ thông tin.
·       Có sở thích với công nghệ, sử dụng tốt máy tính.
·       Cẩn thận, trung thực, có tinh thần trách nhiệm trong công việc.
Yêu cầu ứng viên:
·       Có sở thích với công nghệ, sử dụng tốt máy tính
·       Giao tiếp tốt, giọng nói dễ nghe
·       Tốt nghiệp cao đẳng trở lên.
Quyền lợi:
·       Lương: Thỏa thuận theo năng lực

job_title: Chief Technology Officer (CTO) - AI & Platform Transformation
job_description:
About The Company
Our client is a leading technology company in Vietnam undergoing a significant transformation from a traditional software provider into an AI-first technology organization. With a vision to deliver AI-as-a-Service and Agent-as-a-Service solutions, the company serves hundreds of thousands of enterprises, government agencies, and business households while continuously expanding its technology ecosystem.
To support this ambitious growth strategy, we are seeking an experienced Chief Technology Officer (CTO) to drive technology innovation, accelerate AI adoption, and build scalable platforms that will shape the company's future.
Key Responsibilities
Technology Leadership & Strategy
Define and execute the company's long-term technology vision, roadmap, and architecture strategy in alignment with business objectives.
Provide strategic leadership across technology, engineering, infrastructure, and data functions.
Ensure the organization maintains its position as a technology leader within Vietnam and strengthens its competitiveness across the region.
Evaluate and leverage emerging technologies to create sustainable business advantages and improve customer outcomes.
AI Strategy & Innovation
Lead the strategic direction, development, and implementation of AI initiatives across the organization.
Drive the adoption of advanced AI technologies, including Agentic AI and intelligent automation solutions.
Ensure AI products and solutions deliver measurable business value and meaningful customer impact.
Foster a culture of innovation and continuous technological advancement.
Data Governance & Data Platform
Establish and oversee a comprehensive data strategy covering data collection, management, governance, security, and utilization.
Build scalable data platforms that support AI development and business decision-making.
Ensure data assets are effectively managed and leveraged as a strategic business capability.
Promote data-driven decision-making across the organization.
System Architecture & Platform Scalability
Design and govern modern, scalable, and high-performance technology architectures.
Lead architecture modernization initiatives to support future growth and evolving business needs.
Ensure reliability, security, scalability, and operational excellence across all technology platforms.
Drive engineering best practices and technology standardization across the organization.
Engineering Leadership & Talent Development
Build, develop, and inspire a high-performing engineering organization.
Establish competency frameworks, development methodologies, and talent development programs.
Foster a culture of continuous learning, collaboration, innovation, and accountability.
Strengthen leadership capabilities across engineering teams to support long-term organizational growth.
Candidate Requirements
Required Qualifications
Strong strategic thinking, analytical capability, creativity, and decision-making skills.
Minimum 5 years of experience as a CTO or equivalent senior technology leadership role within large-scale technology organizations.
Proven experience leading engineering organizations comprising 500+ software engineers.
Demonstrated success in operating and scaling platforms serving millions of users and hundreds of thousands of business customers.
Deep understanding of Artificial Intelligence and practical experience developing AI products or integrating AI capabilities into software solutions.
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related discipline.
Excellent English communication skills with experience presenting, speaking, or representing organizations at conferences, industry forums, or executive events.
Preferred Qualifications
Master's degree or PhD in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Information Technology, or related fields.
Experience working within product-driven technology organizations.
Exposure to large-scale platform businesses and digital transformation initiatives.
What We Offer
Competitive Rewards
Attractive executive compensation package aligned with experience and performance.
Performance-based incentives and long-term reward programs.
Opportunity to participate in the company's long-term growth journey.
Professional Growth & Impact
Play a key role in shaping the technology strategy of one of Vietnam's leading technology companies.
Lead large-scale AI transformation initiatives with significant business impact.
Work on complex technology challenges involving AI, data, architecture, and platform scalability.
Influence the development of products and services serving millions of users.
Global Exposure
Collaborate with leading technology experts, partners, and industry leaders in Vietnam and internationally.
Represent the company in strategic discussions, conferences, and industry events.
Location: Hanoi, Vietnam
Contact: Lia Thu Hang - 0915 206 917; Email: hang@cnk-consulting.com.vn We appreciate all applications; however, only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

job_title: Customer Service Expert (Remote within APAC region, Contract)
job_description:
OUR HIRING PROCESS:
We will review your application against our job requirements. We do not employ machine learning technologies during this phase as we believe every human deserves attention from another human. We do not think machines can evaluate your application quite like our seasoned recruiting professionals—every person is unique. We promise to give your candidacy a fair and detailed assessment.
We may then invite you to submit a video interview for the review of the hiring manager. This video interview is often followed by a test or short project that allows us to determine whether you will be a good fit for the team.
At this point, we will invite you to interview with our hiring manager and/or the interview team. Please note: We do not conduct interviews via text message, Telegram, etc. and we never hire anyone into our organization without having met you face-to-face (or via Zoom). You will be invited to come to a live meeting or Zoom, where you will meet our INFUSE team.
From there on, it’s decision time! If you are still excited to join INFUSE and we like you as much, we will have a conversation about your offer. We do not make offers without giving you the opportunity to speak with us live.
INFUSE is committed to complying with applicable data privacy and security laws and regulations. For more information, please see our Privacy Policy
Are you driven by the desire to deliver exceptional client experiences and thrive in a dynamic environment? At INFUSE, we're seeking a passionate Client Success Specialist to join our team, where your efforts directly contribute to our clients' satisfaction and our company's success. This position offers an enriching path to professional growth and the unique opportunity to work with a variety of industries, ensuring no two days are the same. INFUSE has built a reputation as a beloved employer by prioritizing employee satisfaction and creating a workplace where everyone feels valued and connected. Joining our team means becoming part of a supportive community that celebrates every success and encourages continuous improvement. You'll discover how our employees love their jobs, driven by the meaningful connections they make and the positive impact they have on our clients' businesses.
Key Responsibilities
Build and maintain strong, long-lasting client relationships
Ensure the timely and successful delivery of our solutions according to client needs and objectives
Communicate clearly the progress of monthly/quarterly initiatives to internal and external stakeholders
Identify and grow opportunities within the territory and collaborate with sales teams to ensure growth attainment
Assist with challenging client requests or issue escalations as needed
Provide assistance across a variety of administrative and operational tasks, such as data entry, updating internal systems, or managing schedules.
Requirements
Proven track record of managing client relationships, preferably in a related field such as hospitality, client success, or sales
Strong communication and interpersonal skills
Can handle various tasks with attention to detail, managing priorities effectively in a fast-paced environment.
Empathetic understanding of client needs and the ability to address them effectively
Ability to address challenges and proactively offer solutions.
If you're passionate about building meaningful relationships and delivering top-notch client experiences, we'd love to hear from you. Apply now to embark on a rewarding career journey with INFUSE, where your ambitions and contributions are recognized and valued. Don't miss your chance to be part of a team that genuinely enjoys making a difference. Submit your application today!
We are an Equal Opportunity Employer. We make hiring decisions based on qualifications, merit, and business needs. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, sex (including pregnancy, sexual orientation, and gender identity), national origin, age, disability, genetic information, or any other characteristic protected under applicable law. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and believe that diversity of experience, culture, and perspective makes us stronger.

job_title: Data Center Technician - Vietnam - Ho Chi Minh - On-site
location: Xã Thái Mỹ, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
job_description:
About The Role
We are seeking an experienced
Data Center Technician
for freelance/contract work in
Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam
. This is an on-site position supporting mission-critical infrastructure at premier data center facilities.
Compensation
₫200000-280000/hr
(VND hourly)
Rates vary based on experience level and project complexity. Emergency and after-hours work may qualify for premium rates.
Engagement Type
Contract/Freelance basis
Flexible scheduling available
Project-based or ongoing support
Remote hands and smart hands services
Key Responsibilities
Perform hardware installations, decommissions, and migrations
Execute structured cabling (copper and fiber optic)
Conduct server racking, stacking, and labeling
Perform cross-connects and patch panel work
Troubleshoot connectivity and hardware issues
Document all work with photos and detailed notes
Coordinate with remote NOC and client teams
2+ years data center or IT infrastructure experience
Strong cabling skills (Cat5e/6/6a, single-mode/multi-mode fiber)
Experience with server hardware (Dell, HP, Supermicro)
Ability to lift 50+ lbs and work in raised floor environments
Own transportation and ability to work on-site
Professional communication skills in English
Data center certifications (CDCP, CDCS, or similar) - preferred
Network certifications (CCNA, CompTIA Network+) - preferred
Experience with DCIM and ticketing systems - preferred
Familiarity with major colocation providers - preferred
Standard tools: screwdrivers, cable testers, label makers, fiber inspection equipment

About The Role
Are you curious about how technology keeps multiple digital banks running smoothly? We're looking for a motivated ITSM Engineer Intern to join GoTyme's IT team. Whether you're a fresh graduate or exploring a new career path in tech, this is your chance to build real skills in IT Service Management using the Atlassian Ecosystem — from day one.
What You'll Do
Help configure and improve ITSM workflows in Jira Service Management and Confluence
Support the team in managing incident, problem, change, and service requests
Assist in building and maintaining the IT knowledge base and service catalog
Collaborate with engineers and operations teams to document and streamline processes
Learn and explore new features of the Atlassian platform under mentorship
Explore how AI tools (like virtual agents and smart triage) are being used to make ITSM faster and smarter — and help us apply them
YOUR GROWTH PATH
ITSM isn't just a role — it's a career with real staying power. The skills you build here travel with you. Jira Service Management is used by over 300,000 organisations worldwide. ITIL, the global standard for IT service management, is recognised in 180+ countries. Whether you end up in fintech, enterprise tech, consulting, or beyond — what you learn here opens doors.
Your certification roadmap starts on day one:
ITIL 4 Foundation — the universal entry credential for IT careers (exam fee covered)
Atlassian Certified: Jira Service Management — proof of hands-on platform expertise (exam fee covered)
From there: ITIL Specialist, Strategic Leader, and beyond — a clear path to senior, architect, and management roles
You'll leave this internship with a real project portfolio, recognised certifications, and a professional identity in one of the most in-demand fields in tech.
Requirements
WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR
Must-have:
Curiosity & eagerness to learn
Basic IT knowledge
Good communication skills
Problem-solving mindset
Comfortable with English
Nice-to-have:
Familiar with Jira or Confluence
Exposure to ITIL concepts
Any IT-related major
Experience in support / helpdesk
Curiosity about AI tools — whether you've used ChatGPT to solve a problem, automated something with a simple script, or just find yourself reading about how AI is changing the way we work
Benefits
Why GoTymeX?
🌏
Global Impact
- Be part of a team reshaping financial access across multiple countries
💡
Bold & Ambitious
- We tackle real problems at scale and give you the space to think big
🌱
Growth-First
- Your learning is built into how we work, not an afterthought
🤝
People-Centered
- You'll be supported by mentors who want to see you succeed
⚡
Move Fast, Build Well
- Work with modern tech and agile teams that move with purpose
and many other cool benefits:
Allowance: 6,000,000 VND per month (gross)
Meal allowance: 730,000 VND per month
Free motorbike parking
Insurance: Social insurance as required by Vietnamese labor law, plus premium healthcare for you and your family - no seniority requirement.
Annual leave: 15 days of paid leave per year (pro-rated), supporting a healthy work-life balance
Training programs: Keep learning and growing with access to training and development programs
Many cool company and team activities: You are invited to many activities - all-hands, happy-hour, sports, clubs, and after-work events that build connections beyond the office
